metadata.description: UltraFlow 2.0 — 8 council-selected intelligence dimensions with cross-skill state propagation (UFSD). Zero hallucination, counterfactual gates, evidence triangulation, MVP-proof chains, invariant preservation, assumption registries, skill chain interrupts, and blind spot coverage. All in ~40% fewer tokens than alternatives.

plugins.name: ultraflow
plugins.description: Agentic skills framework with 8 intelligence dimensions, UFSD state propagation, and meta-cognitive failure mode maps. Council-verified precision with minimum tokens.
